title: Youmind 22050 Youmind 22050
prompt: A girl in a fully closed modern white spacesuit with a tinted visor stands on the surface of Mars. Red-orange rocky desert, dusty pinkish sky. Opposite her stands a tall humanoid {argument name="alien description" default="alien with pale pink semi-transparent skin, an elongated skull, large black almond-shaped eyes, and a graceful slender body"} in a tight-fitting bio-organic suit of silvery-pearl color. Realistic detailed anatomy. The girl is handing him an {argument name="human item" default="iPhone in a pink case"}. The alien is handing her a {argument name="alien item" default="crystal vial glowing from within, containing a shimmering blue substance"}. The moment of exchange. Both are looking at each other with cautious curiosity. In the background: a landing module and a strange organic alien ship, a setting Martian sun, long shadows, dust in the air, cinematic epic lighting, 8k, photorealism.
